name: Tuna Swiss Pie
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces tuna in water, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F. Prepare a 9-inch pie pan with cooking spray; set aside. To prepare crust, add spread, garlic powder, and 1 egg white to hot rice.
Spoon the rice mixture into the prepared pan. Press firmly across the bottom and up the sides of the pie pan to form a crust. Layer 1/2 cup cheese and tuna evenly over the rice crust. Meanwhile, to prepare filling, combine milk, remaining egg whites, salt, and black pepper. Pour over the tuna mixture. Bake for 30 minutes or until the center is set. Top with the remaining cheese. Bake for 3 more minutes or until the cheese has melted.
